title: Layered Architecture of Cloud Computing Security
description: A flowchart depicting the multi-layered security responsibilities in a cloud computing model (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), showing which security aspects are managed by the Cloud Provider and which are managed by the Cloud Consumer.
relationships: Cloud Provider is responsible for securing lower layers
Cloud Consumer is responsible for securing upper layers
Shared Responsibility Model defines the boundary
Security controls flow upwards from the provider
